Title: Successful Login
Test Steps:
1. Enter the valid username.
2. Enter the valid password.
3. Click the "Login" button.

Title: Unsuccessful Login (Invalid Username)
Test Steps:
1. Enter the invalid username.
2. Enter the valid password.
3. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is unable to log in.

Title: Unsuccessful Login (Invalid Password)
Test Steps:
1. Enter the valid username.
2. Enter the invalid password.
3. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is unable to log in.

2. Enter the valid username.
3. Enter the valid email.
4. Enter the valid password.
5. Enter the valid name.
6. Enter the valid surname.
7. Enter the valid location.
8. Click the "Register" button.

Title: Successful Object Insertion

3. Enter the valid object name.
